Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/zsolt/AppData/Local/Temp/sonar-be-cov.json','utf8'\)\); const rows=d.components.map\(c=>{const m={};c.measures.forEach\(x=>m[x.metric]=x.periods?x.periods[0].value:x.value\);return {path:c.path,ntc:+\(m.new_lines_to_cover||0\),nul:+\(m.new_uncovered_lines||0\),cov:m.new_coverage}}\).filter\(r=>r.ntc>0||r.nul>0\); rows.sort\(\(a,b\)=>b.nul-a.nul\); rows.forEach\(r=>console.log\(String\(r.nul\).padStart\(4\),'/',String\(r.ntc\).padStart\(4\),' ',\(r.cov?r.cov.slice\(0,5\):'-'\).padStart\(5\),'% ',r.path\)\);")
